title: Xtra Crispy Moroccan Peanuts Pasta
description: A fresh and light Moroccan dish featuring peanuts and a mediterranean friendly pasta water emulsion, perfect for a quick and delicious lunch
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper
Cook the spice mixture for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until fragrant
Add the peanuts to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining the pasta
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet with the peanut mixture and toss to combine
Add the reserved pasta water to the skillet in small increments to create a light and creamy emulsion
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately
